name: ban-matmul-call-sites
description: Add a system-language pre-commit hook and belt-and-suspenders CI step to ban dunder method call sites (e.g. .__matmul__()) in Mojo files while excluding function definition lines. Use when: (1) codebase has been standardized on a free-function form (matmul(A, B)) and you need to prevent dunder-call-site regression, (2) pygrep cannot express the exclusion you need, (3) you need both pre-commit and CI enforcement.
